# panos_dns_proxy (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `location` (Attributes) The location of this object. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--location))
- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `cache` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--cache))
- `default` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--default))
- `domain_servers` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--domain_servers))
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable or disable processing of DNS requests on interface(s) on this object
- `interface` (List of String)
- `static_entries` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--static_entries))
- `tcp_queries` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tcp_queries))
- `udp_queries` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--udp_queries))

Optional:

- `template` (Attributes) Located in a specific template (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--location--template))

Optional:

### Nested Schema for `location.template_stack`

Optional:

- `name` (String) Specific Panorama template stack
- `ngfw_device` (String) The NGFW device
- `panorama_device` (String) Specific Panorama device



<a id="nestedatt--cache"></a>
### Nested Schema for `cache`

Optional:

- `cache_edns` (Boolean) Cache EDNS UDP response
- `enabled` (Boolean) Turn on caching for this DNS object
- `max_ttl` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--cache--max_ttl))

<a id="nestedatt--cache--max_ttl"></a>
### Nested Schema for `cache.max_ttl`

Optional:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable max ttl for this DNS object
- `time_to_live` (Number) Time in seconds after which entry is cleared



<a id="nestedatt--default"></a>
### Nested Schema for `default`

Optional:

- `inheritance` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--default--inheritance))
- `primary` (String) Primary DNS Name server IP address
- `secondary` (String) Secondary DNS Name server IP address

<a id="nestedatt--default--inheritance"></a>
### Nested Schema for `default.inheritance`

Optional:

- `source` (String) Dynamic interface



<a id="nestedatt--domain_servers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `domain_servers`

Required:

- `name` (String)

Optional:

- `cacheable` (Boolean) Turn on caching of domains resolved by this mapping
- `domain_name` (List of String)
- `primary` (String) Primary DNS Name server IP address
- `secondary` (String) Secondary DNS Name server IP address


<a id="nestedatt--static_entries"></a>
### Nested Schema for `static_entries`

Required:

- `name` (String)

Optional:

- `address` (List of String)
- `domain` (String) Fully qualified domain name for specified IP address


<a id="nestedatt--tcp_queries"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tcp_queries`

Optional:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Turn on forwarding of TCP DNS queries
- `max_pending_requests` (Number) Upper limit on number of concurrent TCP DNS requests


<a id="nestedatt--udp_queries"></a>
### Nested Schema for `udp_queries`

Optional:

- `retries` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--udp_queries--retries))

<a id="nestedatt--udp_queries--retries"></a>
### Nested Schema for `udp_queries.retries`

Optional:

- `attempts` (Number) Maximum number of retries before trying next name server
- `interval` (Number) Time in seconds for another request to be sent
